prompt: Tap hijack seat before turn-compression action.
why_v1: Seat anchor keeps action order stable before range decisions.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Hijack is the seat anchor here because the earlier late-position range is the one being squeezed by the compressed turn.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. The hijack is the right seat anchor here because that earlier late-position range is the one the compressed turn is squeezing.
